Center Field.Body: You look around, players charging at you. Your team is down 1-0 in the Champions League Final with 10 minutes to go. What do you do?

Advice: The key to winning is patience, keep passing.
Think methodically, don't rush to the final position.
Use all your options avalible, it is a team game after all!

Right Midfield.Body: You recieve the ball with a player running at you from the center field. You only have a few seconds before the ball is stolen from you. Act quick!

Choices.Text: Play an outside ball moving forward

Right Wing.Body: You speed through the wing, no one can catch you, time to send in a cross. Use all the force you can... not too much though.
Right Wing.GameOver: You sent the pass too far and now it is out of bounds. Restart the game.

Right Back.Body: Okay, nice reset, scan for options but don't wait too long, the pressure is slowly creeping up.

Choices.Text: Cycle the Ball around to Center Back
Send the ball up the wing

Center Back.Body: Cool, calm, and collected. You can see the whole pitch. What is your next move?

Left Back.Body: Oh! Someone misjudged the accuracy of their pass. Great job moving the ball around but it looks like it is out of bounds now...

Throw In.Body: Tha ball has gone out, but suddenly you hear your coach scream. SWITCH THE POINT OF ATTACK. What does he mean?

Left Midfield.Body: The pace is picking up, only a few minutes left, lets try and score quickly eh?

StrikerOne.Body: That cross came in fast, put the ball in the back of the net and you'll solidify yourself in history.

StrikerTwo.Body: The ball lands at your feet, all of the team's trust lying on your shoulders. Score a goal and make history.

Choices.Text: Pass Back to the first attacker.
Curve Shot into the top right corner.

Score.Body: GOALASO!!!! What a shot, the crowd errupts, your teammates chase you to the corner flag. You have given your team a second chance to win, but for now all that matters is YOU scored.

Goalie.Body: Back to the goalie, hmmm, interesting choice but be careful, one slip up and an own goal is bound to happen.

Choices.Text: Pass the ball back to defense.
